title: Effect diagnostics executor
description: Execute @effect/language-service diagnostics for a file or a tsconfig project

tsConfig.description: Path to a tsconfig file, relative to workspace root

file.description: Path to a file to check, relative to workspace root

strict.description: Treat warnings as errors in exit code

progress.description: Show progress as files are checked

cwd.description: Working directory, relative to workspace root

outputFile.description: Optional file path to write stdout diagnostics output
